data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subject-based extensibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Subject-based extensibility for plugin/domain-specific targets', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for subject-based extensibility, yet the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence or checks related to this specific requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming subject-based extensibility for plugin/domain-specific targets.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
